hero.paragraph: GPS route monitoring, instant alerts and attendance control. Peace of mind for families, efficiency for schools.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: Everything you need for school safety
features.description: A complete platform for administrators, drivers and families.

cards.title: Real-time GPS
cards.description: Precise location of each bus on the map with updates every 10 seconds.

cards.title: Instant alerts
cards.description: Push notifications when the bus arrives, deviates or any incident occurs.

cards.title: Attendance control
cards.description: Automatic check-in and check-out record of each student on the bus.

cards.title: Admin Dashboard
cards.description: Complete dashboard with metrics, reports and route and driver management.

cards.title: Family app
cards.description: Parents follow the bus route and receive notifications on their phone.

cards.title: Secure data
cards.description: End-to-end encryption and compliance with data protection regulations.

steps.title: Register your institution
steps.description: Create your account, add your routes and drivers in minutes.

steps.title: Install on the buses
steps.description: Install the GPS device on each bus in less than 5 minutes.

steps.title: Invite families
steps.description: Parents download Guardian Escolar and follow the route in real time.

steps.title: Active monitoring
steps.description: Real-time monitoring from the administration panel.

cta.title: Ready to protect your students?
cta.description: Join more than 500 institutions that already trust Guardian Escolar.

footer.description: School monitoring system for safer routes and more peaceful families.
